summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Sub-fase 1.6.1 Backorder Approval & Auto-commit features. All backend APIs, data integrity, API contracts, and frontend UI elements verified successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: DECOUPLE - SO with allow_backorder=true & qty>stock (stock>0) has status='reserved' (not 'waiting_stock') + has_backorder=true
Backend: APPROVAL-WITH-BACKORDER - SO 'reserved'+has_backorder can be submitted and approved
Backend: AUTO-COMMIT - After GR, SO stays 'approved', has_backorder=false, backorder_qty=0, rolls all 'committed'
Backend: REGRESSION - Normal SO (qty<=stock, no backorder) works correctly with status='reserved'
Backend: REGRESSION - SO with allow_backorder=false & insufficient stock returns HTTP 409
Data Integrity: All 88 invariants passed (L0-L5, including L4-BO backorder invariants)
API Contract: All FE↔BE contract checks passed (0 errors, 0 warnings)
Frontend: Backorder stat displays count of orders with has_backorder=true
Frontend: Backorder chip visible in order list for orders with has_backorder=true
Frontend: Backorder chip visible in order detail panel header
Frontend: Backorder panel/banner visible in detail panel with explanatory text
Frontend: Backorder lines showing product and qty waiting
Frontend: Submit for approval button visible for 'reserved'+backorder orders
